description: Elise Yoshida discusses the role of brands in the adoption of Web3 and crypto in the fashion industry, emphasizing the importance of education and consumer engagement.
topic_summary: Yoshida explores the evolution of blockchain in fashion, consumer knowledge of crypto, and the potential of NFTs in bridging physical and digital worlds [t=0:24-0:30]. She highlights the need for brands to understand user needs and the challenges of adoption in a bear market [t=218:46-220:78].
